problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
